{{Quote|Can you please direct me to the bad guys so we can fry them and find a way off this lovely vacation spot?|Lex Kempo while on Gabredor III|<ref name="Blaze of Glory (short story)">{{JournalCite|8|Blaze of Glory (short story)}}</ref>}}
'''Lex Kempo''', nicknamed '''Mad Vornskr''', was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] with the [[Red Moons]]. Earlier in his career he had been a [[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout trooper]] with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and claimed to have been in a dozen different private armies and militias. He was good friends to [[Sully Tigereye]] and [[Hugo Cutter]] and they had a camaraderie where they would trade insults at each other, which confused the rookie of the group [[Brixie Ergo]]. He owned a personal set of scout trooper armor he kept from his days as a scout trooper and the blaster rifle he was assigned with. He also carried a [[DL-18 Blaster Pistol|DL-18 blaster pistol]] and a [[Vibrocutlass/Legends|vibrocutlass]].

While on [[Gabredor III/Legends|Gabredor III]] he killed two scouts for the [[Karazak Slavers' Cooperative/Legends|Karazak Slavers Cooperative]] and blew up their command center along with himself.
